glp1_active.description: Subscribers who selected the GLP-1 filter or added 3+ GLP-1-tagged meals in the last 4 weeks. High intent for high-protein, lower-calorie, satiating meals.

foodies_lapsed_60d.description: Identified as Foodie persona via past order patterns (variety of cuisines, premium-tier dishes). Last order >=60 days ago. Re-engagement target.
constraints: lead with the chef, not the price

athletes_high_protein.description: Subscribers in the Athletes lifestyle bucket. Filter on 25g+ protein per meal. Train logs not available; assume general fitness.
constraints: no specific macros unless on dish card

families_kids_friendly.description: Households with kids-friendly filter active. Weeknight dinner focus, larger plan sizes (8/12/16).
constraints: no peanut content without allergen flag

better_than_takeout_winback.description: Lapsed subscribers who originally signed up via the 'Better Than Takeout' acquisition path. Compare against a takeout night frame.
constraints: never name a competitor takeout brand

carnivore_premium.description: High-AOV subscribers who consistently order beef, pork, and lamb-forward dishes. Premium tier; avoid plant-forward framing.
